_comment: CNC Tool Database — metric mm, aluminium-first. Tool specs derived from Sandvik Coromant and Kennametal published catalogues for aluminium alloys (6061, 7075). Vc and feed values are conservative mid-range recommendations. ramp_plunge values are expressed as percentages of the normal cutting feed — parameter_calculation.py multiplies these at runtime. Add entries as new part families are encountered.

tools._section: CENTER DRILLS — 60-degree combined center drills for accurate hole location before twist drilling

aluminium.notes: Short peck recommended — center drill is rigid but tip is fragile

tools._section: TWIST DRILLS — solid carbide, metric standard series

tools.description: Solid carbide jobber drill 1.25mm — nearest standard to 1.26mm

tools._section: END MILLS — for contour_mill, counterbore_mill, circular_interp. ramp_plunge percentages are applied to the computed feed rate at runtime.
tools.description: 2-flute solid carbide end mill 1mm — aluminium geometry

aluminium.notes: Very fragile — low depth of cut

tools.description: 2-flute solid carbide end mill 2mm — aluminium geometry
2-flute solid carbide end mill 3mm — aluminium geometry
2-flute solid carbide end mill 4mm — aluminium geometry
2-flute solid carbide end mill 6mm — aluminium geometry
2-flute solid carbide end mill 8mm — aluminium geometry
2-flute solid carbide end mill 10mm — aluminium geometry
2-flute solid carbide end mill 16mm — aluminium geometry
2-flute solid carbide end mill 20mm — aluminium geometry

tools._section: FACE MILLS — indexable insert shell mills
tools.description: 50mm indexable face mill / shell mill — 4 inserts

aluminium.notes: Polished inserts for aluminium — PCD optional

tools.description: 63mm indexable face mill / shell mill — 5 inserts

tools._section: CHAMFER MILLS — 90-degree included angle (45-degree half-angle), for edge chamfering and deburring after milling

aluminium.notes: Light contact passes only — do not use as end mill

tools._section: SLOT MILLS — 2-flute, short cutting length, optimised for full-width slot cutting (100% radial engagement). Lower feeds than end mills due to full engagement.
tools.description: 2-flute solid carbide slot mill 4mm — short cut length for rigidity

aluminium.notes: Full width engagement — reduce feed by 40% vs end mill slotting

tools.description: 2-flute solid carbide slot mill 6mm — short cut length for rigidity
2-flute solid carbide slot mill 8mm — short cut length for rigidity

tools._section: TAPS — metric right-hand, for rigid tapping (G84). feed_per_rev_mm = thread pitch. Pilot hole diameter listed under pilot_hole_mm.

aluminium.notes: Rigid tapping G84 — feed MUST equal pitch. Use tapping fluid.

mild_steel.notes: Rigid tapping G84 — use cutting oil

stainless_steel.notes: Rigid tapping — very low speed, flood coolant

aluminium.notes: Rigid tapping G84 — use tapping fluid

mild_steel.notes: Rigid tapping G84 — use cutting oil

aluminium.notes: Rigid tapping G84 — use tapping fluid

mild_steel.notes: Rigid tapping G84 — use cutting oil
